name: Oddish
description: If exposed to moonlight, it starts to move. It roams far and wide at night to scatter its seeds.

attacks.name: Leaf Boomerang
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

name: Gloom
description: Its pistils exude an incredibly foul odor. The horrid stench can cause fainting at a distance of 1.25 miles.

attacks.name: Offensive Scent
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.

name: Bellossom
description: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.

attacks.name: Flower Spin
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 80 damage for each heads. Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Tangela
description: Hidden beneath a tangle of vines that grows nonstop even if the vines are torn off, this Pokémon's true appearance remains a mystery.

name: Tangrowth
description: Tangrowth has two arms that it can extend as it pleases. Recent research has shown that these arms are, in fact, bundles of vines.

attacks.name: Suctioning Vines
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Scyther
description: As Scyther fights more and more battles, its scythes become sharper and sharper. With a single slice, Scyther can fell a massive tree.

attacks.name: Mach Cut
attacks.effect: Discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Sunkern
description: It lives by drinking only dewdrops from under the leaves of plants. It is said that it eats nothing else.

name: Yanma
description: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter windows in the area.

attacks.name: Swoop Across
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Yanmega
description: This six-legged Pokémon is easily capable of transporting an adult in flight. The wings on its tail help it stay balanced.

attacks.name: Shoot Through
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Jet Wing
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Kricketot
description: When its antennae hit each other, it sounds like the music of a xylophone.

attacks.name: Trip Over
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Cherubi
description: The deeper a Cherubi's red, the more nutrients it has stockpiled in its body. And the sweeter and tastier its small ball!

name: Carnivine
description: It binds itself to trees in marshes. It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling drool and gulps them down.

attacks.name: Festering Saliva
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned and Poisoned.

attacks.name: Bind Down
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Leaf Guard
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Slashing Strike
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Slashing Strike.

attacks.name: Leaf Guard
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Grubbin
description: It uses its big jaws to dig nests into the forest floor, and it loves to feed on sweet tree sap.

attacks.name: Energize
attacks.effect: Attach a Lightning Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Zarude
description: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It's incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it.

attacks.name: Drag Off
attacks.effect: Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to the new Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Triple Whip
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 70 damage for each heads.

name: Calyrex
description: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.

attacks.name: King's Instructions
attacks.effect: You may search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Bloomshine
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Incinerate
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Explosive Fire
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: Star Blaze
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game.)

name: Radiant Charizard
description: It spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.

abilities.name: Excited Heart
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's attacks cost Colorless less for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

attacks.name: Combustion Blast
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Combustion Blast.

name: Entei
description: It is said that when it roars, a volcano erupts somewhere around the globe.

abilities.name: Explosive Heat Dash
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has any Fire Energy attached, it has no Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Bursting Power
attacks.effect: You may attach up to 2 basic Energy cards from your hand to your Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Flare Juggling
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fireball Fever
attacks.effect: You may discard up to 5 cards from the top of your deck. This attack does 40 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Ember Star
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each Energy card in your discard pile. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game.)

name: Larvesta
description: The people of ancient times believed that Larvesta fell from the sun.

name: Volcarona
description: Volcarona scatters burning scales. Some say it does this to start fires. Others say it's trying to rescue those that suffer in the cold.

attacks.name: Volcanic Heat
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Volcanion
description: It expels its internal steam from the arms on its back. It has enough power to blow away a mountain.

attacks.name: Hydro Burn
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Water Energy attached, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Salandit
description: Its venom sacs produce a fluid that this Pokémon then heats up with the flame in its tail. This process creates Salandit's poisonous gas.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Salazzle
description: Only female Salazzle exist. They emit a gas laden with pheromones to captivate male Salandit.

attacks.name: Tail Trickery
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Super Singe
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Seel
description: Thanks to its thick fat, cold seas don't bother it at all, but it gets tired pretty easily in warm waters.

name: Galarian Mr. Mime
description: It can radiate chilliness from the bottoms of its feet. It'll spend the whole day tap-dancing on a frozen floor.

attacks.name: Find It
attacks.effect: Search your deck for an Item card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Wailmer
description: It shows off by spraying jets of seawater from the nostrils above its eyes. It eats a solid ton of Wishiwashi every day.

attacks.name: Nap
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Wailord
description: It can sometimes knock out opponents with the shock created by breaching and crashing its big body onto the water.

attacks.name: Bubble Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Corphish
description: No matter how dirty the water in the river, it will adapt and thrive. It has a strong will to survive.

name: Snorunt
description: It can only survive in cold areas. It bounces happily around, even in environments as cold as -150 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Luvdisc
description: Luvdisc makes its home in coral reefs in warm seas. It especially likes sleeping in the space between Corsola's branches.

attacks.name: Emotional Draw
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 5 cards.

name: Kyogre
description: It is said to have widened the seas by causing downpours. It had been asleep in a marine trench.

attacks.name: Wave Summoning
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Water Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Dynamic Wave
attacks.effect: Put 3 Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand. This attack does 180 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Dual Splash
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Aqua Typhoon
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Aqua Typhoon.

attacks.name: Frost Charge
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Water Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Shinx
description: All of its fur dazzles if danger is sensed. It flees while the foe is momentarily blinded.

name: Shinx
description: This Pokémon generates electricity by contracting its muscles. Excited trembling is a sign that Shinx is generating a tremendous amount of electricity.

attacks.name: Thunder Jolt
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

name: Luxio
description: Strong electricity courses through the tips of its sharp claws. A light scratch causes fainting in foes.

attacks.name: Jumping Kick
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Luxio
description: By joining its tail with that of another Luxio, this Pokémon can receive some of the other Luxio's electricity and power up its own electric blasts.

attacks.name: Shorting Spark
attacks.effect: This attack does 90 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon that has a Pokémon Tool attached. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Luxray
description: Luxray's ability to see through objects comes in handy when it's scouting for danger.

attacks.name: Electrostep
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Scar Strikes
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 100 more damage.

name: Luxray
description: Luxray can see through solid objects. It will instantly spot prey trying to hide behind walls, even if the walls are thick.

abilities.name: Explosiveness
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon is in your hand when you are setting up to play, you may put it face down as your Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Seeking Fang
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Trainer cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

abilities.name: Instant Charge
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may draw 3 cards. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

attacks.name: Scrap Short
attacks.effect: Put any number of Pokémon Tool cards from your discard pile in the Lost Zone. This attack does 40 more damage for each card you put in the Lost Zone in this way.

attacks.name: Scrap Pulse
attacks.effect: Put any number of Pokémon Tool cards from your discard pile in the Lost Zone. This attack does 40 more damage for each card you put in the Lost Zone in this way.

name: Emolga
description: As it flies, it scatters electricity around, so bird Pokémon keep their distance. That's why Emolga can keep all its food to itself.

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Eelektrik
description: These Pokémon have a big appetite. When they spot their prey, they attack it and paralyze it with electricity.

abilities.name: Ad Hoc Shock
abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Helioptile
description: When spread, the frills on its head act like solar panels, generating the power behind this Pokémon's electric moves.

name: Heliolisk
description: A now-vanished desert culture treasured these Pokémon. Appropriately, when Heliolisk came to the Galar region, treasure came with them.

attacks.name: Wild Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

name: Radiant Charjabug
description: While its durable shell protects it from attacks, Charjabug strikes at enemies with jolts of electricity discharged from the tips of its jaws.

abilities.name: Shocking Block
abilities.effect: Whenever any player attaches an Energy card from their hand to 1 of their Pokémon V, put 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Linear Attack
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Zeraora
description: It approaches its enemies at the speed of lightning, then tears them limb from limb with its sharp claws.

attacks.name: Wild Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Thunderous Bolt
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Reactive Pulse
attacks.effect: This attack does 60 damage for each of your opponent's Pokémon in play that has an Ability.

attacks.name: Max Fist
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Crushing Beat
attacks.effect: You may discard a Stadium in play.

attacks.name: Lightning Storm Star
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon 4 times. (You can choose the same Pokémon more than once.) For each time you chose a Pokémon, do 60 damage to it. This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game.)

name: Pincurchin
description: It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Continuous Tumble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

name: Exeggcute
description: Though it may look like it's just a bunch of eggs, it's a proper Pokémon. Exeggcute communicates with others of its kind via telepathy, apparently.

attacks.name: Psy Bolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Exeggutor
description: Each of Exeggutor's three heads is thinking different thoughts. The three don't seem to be very interested in one another.

attacks.name: Powerful Storm
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

name: Mewtwo
description: A Pokémon created by recombining Mew's genes. It's said to have the most savage heart among Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psypump
attacks.effect: Attach up to 2 Psychic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Limit Break
attacks.effect: If your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining, this attack does 90 more damage.

attacks.name: Energy Mix
attacks.effect: Search your deck for an Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Fusion Strike Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Psychic Leap
attacks.effect: You may shuffle this Pokémon and all attached cards into your deck.

name: Girafarig
description: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent by biting.

attacks.name: Double Draw
attacks.effect: Draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Lunatone
description: The phase of the moon apparently has some effect on its power. It's active on the night of a full moon.

attacks.name: Cycle Draw
attacks.effect: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Moon Kinesis
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Dusclops
description: Its body is entirely hollow. When it opens its mouth, it sucks everything in as if it were a black hole.

attacks.name: Fade to Black
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Tapu Lele
description: Although called a guardian deity, Tapu Lele is devoid of guilt about its cruel disposition and can be described as nature incarnate.

attacks.name: Energy Burst
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each Energy attached to both Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spiral Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Horoscope
attacks.effect: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may attach any number of Energy cards you find there to this Pokémon. Put the other cards back in any order.

attacks.name: Teleportation Burst
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

abilities.name: Witch's Domain
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may move up to 2 damage counters from your Pokémon to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: G-Max Smite
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Enamorus
description: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.

attacks.name: Draining Kiss
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Loving Sympathy
attacks.effect: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, this attack does 70 more damage.

name: Graveler
description: It travels by rolling down cliffs. If it falls into a river, it will explode with its last gasp.

name: Solrock
description: When it rotates itself, it gives off light similar to the sun, thus blinding its foes.

abilities.name: Sun Energy
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a Psychic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Lunatone.

name: Baltoy
description: It was discovered in ancient ruins. While moving, it constantly spins. It stands on one foot even when asleep.

name: Riolu
description: It's exceedingly energetic, with enough stamina to keep running all through the night. Taking it for walks can be a challenging experience.

name: Pancham
description: It chooses a Pangoro as its master and then imitates its master's actions. This is how it learns to battle and hunt for prey.

name: Rockruff
description: This Pokémon can bond very strongly with its Trainer, but it also has a habit of biting. Raising a Rockruff for a long time can be challenging.

attacks.name: Invite Out
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.

name: Lycanroc
description: This form of Lycanroc is reckless. It charges headlong at its opponents, attacking without any care about what injuries it might receive.

attacks.name: Midnight Fang
attacks.effect: This attack does 80 less damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Koffing
description: It adores polluted air. Some claim that Koffing used to be more plentiful in the Galar region than they are now.

attacks.name: Smog
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Absol
description: Swift as the wind, Absol races through fields and mountains. Its curved, bow-like horn is acutely sensitive to the warning signs of natural disasters.

attacks.name: Lost Claw
attacks.effect: Put a random card from your opponent's hand in the Lost Zone.

name: Purrloin
description: It steals things from people just to amuse itself with their frustration. A rivalry exists between this Pokémon and Nickit.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

name: Liepard
description: Don't be fooled by its gorgeous fur and elegant figure. This is a moody and vicious Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

name: Krokorok
description: It buries some of its prey in the sand to use as emergency meals when its hunts are unsuccessful.

attacks.name: Dredge Up
attacks.effect: Discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

name: Pangoro
description: This Pokémon is quick to anger, and it has no problem using its prodigious strength to get its way. It lives for duels against Obstagoon.

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

name: Skrelp
description: It drifts in the ocean, blending in with floating seaweed. When other Pokémon come to feast on the seaweed, Skrelp feasts on them instead.

name: Dragalge
description: Dragalge uses a poisonous liquid capable of corroding metal to send tankers that enter its territory to the bottom of the sea.

attacks.name: Rocket Poison
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. If this Pokémon evolved from Skrelp during this turn, put 8 damage counters on that Pokémon instead of 1 during Pokémon Checkup.

name: Hoopa
description: It gathers things it likes and passes them through its loop to teleport them to a secret place.

attacks.name: Assault Gate
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon didn't move from the Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does nothing. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness.

name: Galarian Meowth
description: Living with a savage, seafaring people has toughened this Pokémon's body so much that parts of it have turned to iron.

attacks.name: Fasten Claws
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Galarian Perrserker
description: What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.

attacks.name: Sharp Claws
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Scizor
description: Bulky pincers account for one third of Scizor's body weight. A single swing of one of these pincers will crush a boulder completely.

attacks.name: X-Scissor
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Dangerous Claws
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Basic Pokémon, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Aron
description: It eats iron ore—and sometimes railroad tracks— to build up the steel armor that protects its body.

attacks.name: Slight Intrusion
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

name: Lairon
description: Lairon live in mountains brimming with spring water and iron ore, so these Pokémon often came into conflict with humans in the past.

attacks.name: Wreak Havoc
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

name: Aggron
description: Aggron has a horn sharp enough to perforate thick iron sheets. It brings down its opponents by ramming into them horn first.

attacks.name: Counter Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is damaged by an attack (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), put damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon equal to the damage done to this Pokémon.

name: Metang
description: Two Beldum have become stuck together via their own magnetic forces. With two brains, the resulting Metang has doubled psychic powers.

attacks.name: Bullet Punch
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

name: Pawniard
description: It uses river stones to maintain the cutting edges of the blades covering its body. These sharpened blades allow it to bring down opponents.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

name: Pawniard
description: It uses river stones to maintain the cutting edges of the blades covering its body. These sharpened blades allow it to bring down opponents.

name: Bisharp
description: It's accompanied by a large retinue of Pawniard. Bisharp keeps a keen eye on its minions, ensuring none of them even think of double-crossing it.

attacks.name: Spike Draw
attacks.effect: Draw 2 cards.

name: Zacian
description: Now armed with a weapon it used in ancient times, this Pokémon needs only a single strike to fell even Gigantamax Pokémon.

attacks.name: Battle Legion
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Piercing Strike
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance, or by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Behemoth Blade
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon VMAX, this attack does 160 more damage.

attacks.name: Break Edge
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance, or by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sword Star
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game.)

name: Zamazenta
description: Its ability to deflect any attack led to it being known as the Fighting Master's Shield. It was feared and respected by all.

abilities.name: Metal Shield
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has any Energy attached, it takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Retaliate
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 120 more damage.

abilities.name: Regal Stance
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may discard your hand and draw 5 cards. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

attacks.name: Revenge Blast
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

attacks.name: Giga Impact
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

attacks.name: Spiral Burst
attacks.effect: You may discard up to 2 basic Fire Energy or up to 2 basic Lightning Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 80 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.

abilities.name: Azure Pulse
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may discard your hand and draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Max Burst
attacks.effect: You may discard any amount of basic Fire Energy or any amount of basic Lightning Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 80 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.

abilities.name: Azure Pulse
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may discard your hand and draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Max Burst
attacks.effect: You may discard any amount of basic Fire Energy or any amount of basic Lightning Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 80 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Breaking Swipe
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon's attacks do 30 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

abilities.name: Skyscraper
abilities.effect: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon that have Special Energy attached.

attacks.name: G-Max Pulverization
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Radiant Eternatus
description: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.

abilities.name: Climactic Gate
abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 2 Pokémon VMAX and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

name: Tauros
description: When Tauros begins whipping itself with its tails, it's a warning that the Pokémon is about to charge with astounding speed.

attacks.name: Adrena-Tackle
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has no damage counters on it, this attack does nothing.

name: Ditto
description: It can reconstitute its entire cellular structure to change into what it sees, but it returns to normal when it relaxes.

abilities.name: Sudden Transformation
abilities.effect: This Pokémon can use the attacks of any Basic Pokémon in your discard pile, except for Pokémon with a Rule Box (Pokémon V, Pokémon-GX, etc. have Rule Boxes). (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

attacks.name: Vee Brave
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon V, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Snorlax
description: This Pokémon's stomach is so strong, even eating moldy or rotten food will not affect it.

name: Starly
description: They flock around mountains and fields, chasing after bug Pokémon. Their singing is noisy and annoying.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Bidoof
description: It constantly gnaws on logs and rocks to whittle down its front teeth. It nests alongside water.

abilities.name: Carefree Countenance
abilities.effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Hyper Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Chatot
description: It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying.

attacks.name: Cycle Draw
attacks.effect: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Angry Whack
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon. This Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Giga Impact
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Shaymin
description: The blooming of Gracidea flowers confers the power of flight upon it. Feelings of gratitude are the message it delivers.

attacks.name: Gather Flowers
attacks.effect: Shuffle up to 2 Energy cards from your discard pile into your deck.

attacks.name: Double Dip Fangs
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Basic Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from this attack, take 1 more Prize card.

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

name: Yungoos
description: Although it will eat anything, it prefers fresh living things, so it marches down streets in search of prey.

name: Gumshoos
description: Patient by nature, this Pokémon loses control of itself and pounces when it spots its favorite meal—Rattata!

attacks.name: Stakeout Headbutt
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon moved from the Bench to the Active Spot during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 120 more damage.

name: Oranguru
description: With waves of its fan—made from leaves and its own fur—Oranguru skillfully gives instructions to other Pokémon.

attacks.name: Primate Acting
attacks.effect: Choose a Supporter card from your opponent's discard pile and use the effect of that card as the effect of this attack.

attacks.name: Body Slam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Nom-Nom-Nom Incisors
attacks.effect: Draw 3 cards.

name: Wooloo
description: Its curly fleece is such an effective cushion that this Pokémon could fall off a cliff and stand right back up at the bottom, unharmed.

attacks.name: Rolling Rollout
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

name: Dubwool
description: Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You'll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it.

attacks.name: Overhead Throw
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Rolling Dash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

name: Bea
effect: Discard the top 5 cards of your deck, and attach any Energy cards you discarded in this way to your Benched Fighting Pokémon in any way you like.

name: Bede
effect: Attach a basic Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Crushing Hammer
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Digging Duo
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, look at the bottom 8 cards of your deck and put 1 of them into your hand. If tails, look at the bottom 3 cards of your deck and put 1 of them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

name: Energy Retrieval
effect: Put up to 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

name: Energy Search
effect: Search your deck for a basic Energy card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Energy Switch
effect: Move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

name: Friends in Hisui
effect: Draw 3 cards.

name: Friends in Sinnoh
effect: Draw 3 cards.

name: Great Ball
effect: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Pokémon you find there and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

name: Hop
effect: Draw 3 cards.

name: Leon
effect: During this turn, your Pokémon's attacks do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Lost Vacuum
effect:
You can use this card only if you put another card from your hand in the Lost Zone.
Choose a Pokémon Tool attached to any Pokémon, or any Stadium in play, and put it in the Lost Zone.

name: Nessa
effect: Put up to 4 in any combination of Water Pokémon and Water Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

name: Poké Ball
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Pokémon Catcher
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon.

name: Potion
effect: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

name: Raihan
effect:
You can play this card only if any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn.
Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon. If you do, search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Rare Candy
effect: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card onto the Basic Pokémon to evolve it, skipping the Stage 1. You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

name: Rescue Carrier
effect: Put up to 2 Pokémon, each with 90 HP or less, from your discard pile into your hand.

name: Sky Seal Stone
effect:
The Pokémon V this card is attached to can use the VSTAR Power on this card.
Star Order
During your turn, you may use this Ability. During this turn, if your opponent's Active Pokémon VSTAR or Active Pokémon VMAX is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your Basic Pokémon V, take 1 more Prize card. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game.)

name: Switch
effect: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Trekking Shoes
effect: Look at the top card of your deck. You may put that card into your hand. If you don't, discard that card and draw a card.

name: Ultra Ball
effect:
You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand.
Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Elesa's Sparkle
effect: Choose up to 2 of your Fusion Strike Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a Fusion Strike Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Friends in Hisui
effect: Draw 3 cards.

name: Friends in Sinnoh
effect: Draw 3 cards.

name: Professor's Research
effect: Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.

name: Volo
effect: Discard 1 of your Benched Pokémon V and all attached cards.

name: Pikachu
description: Pikachu that can generate powerful electricity have cheek sacs that are extra soft and super stretchy.

attacks.name: Wild Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

name: Hisuian Voltorb
description: An enigmatic Pokémon that happens to bear a resemblance to a Poké Ball. When excited, it discharges the electric current it has stored in its belly, then lets out a great, uproarious laugh.

attacks.name: Cheerful Charge
attacks.effect: You can use this attack only if you go second, and only during your first turn. Choose up to 2 of your Benched Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

name: Kricketune
description: It signals its emotions with its melodies. Scientists are studying these melodic patterns.

abilities.name: Swelling Tune
abilities.effect: Your Grass Pokémon in play, except any Kricketune, get +40 HP. You can't apply more than 1 Swelling Tune Ability at a time.

name: Magmortar
description: When Magmortar inhales deeply, the fire burning in its belly intensifies, rising in temperature to over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

attacks.name: Boltsplosion
attacks.effect: If Electivire is on your Bench, this attack does 120 more damage.

name: Oricorio
description: This Oricorio has drunk red nectar. If its Trainer gives the wrong order, this passionate Pokémon becomes fiercely angry.

abilities.name: Lesson in Zeal
abilities.effect: All of your Fusion Strike Pokémon take 20 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance). You can't apply more than 1 Lesson in Zeal Ability at a time.

attacks.name: Glistening Droplets
attacks.effect: Put 5 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

name: Lapras
description: A smart and kindhearted Pokémon, it glides across the surface of the sea while its beautiful song echoes around it.

attacks.name: Raging Freeze
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon during their last turn, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Manaphy
description: It starts its life with a wondrous power that permits it to bond with any kind of Pokémon.

abilities.name: Wave Veil
abilities.effect: Prevent all damage done to your Benched Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Keldeo
description: When it is resolute, its body fills with power and it becomes swifter. Its jumps are then too fast to follow.

attacks.name: Line Force
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Electivire
description: The amount of electrical energy this Pokémon produces is proportional to the rate of its pulse. The voltage jumps while Electivire is battling.

attacks.name: Explosive Bolt
attacks.effect: If any of your Benched Magmortar have any damage counters on them, this attack does 90 more damage.

attacks.name: High-Voltage Current
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Toxtricity
description: It has an electrical organ on its chest. While generating electricity, it fills its surroundings with what sounds like the strumming of a bass guitar.

abilities.name: Maximum Downer
abilities.effect: If all your Pokémon in play are Fusion Strike Pokémon, your opponent's Pokémon VMAX in play get -30 HP.

name: Mew
description: Its DNA is said to contain the genetic codes of all Pokémon, so it can use all kinds of techniques.

abilities.name: Mysterious Tail
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may look at the top 6 cards of your deck, reveal an Item card you find there, and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

name: Lunatone
description: The phase of the moon apparently has some effect on its power. It's active on the night of a full moon.

attacks.name: Cycle Draw
attacks.effect: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Moon Kinesis
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Deoxys
description: DNA from a space virus mutated and became a Pokémon. It appears where auroras are seen.

attacks.name: Photon Boost
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Fusion Strike Energy attached, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Diancie
description: It can instantly create many diamonds by compressing the carbon in the air between its hands.

abilities.name: Princess's Curtain
abilities.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, whenever your opponent plays a Supporter card from their hand, prevent all effects of that card done to your Benched Basic Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spike Draw
attacks.effect: Draw 2 cards.

name: Comfey
description: Comfey picks flowers with its vine and decorates itself with them. For some reason, flowers won't wither once they're attached to a Comfey.

abilities.name: Flower Selecting
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck and put 1 of them into your hand. Put the other card in the Lost Zone.

name: Solrock
description: When it rotates itself, it gives off light similar to the sun, thus blinding its foes.

abilities.name: Sun Energy
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a Psychic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Lunatone.

name: Absol
description: Swift as the wind, Absol races through fields and mountains. Its curved, bow-like horn is acutely sensitive to the warning signs of natural disasters.

attacks.name: Swirling Disaster
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Claw Rend
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 70 more damage.

name: Thievul
description: It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it.

abilities.name: Baffling
abilities.effect: If your opponent has 2 or fewer Prize cards remaining, whenever your opponent plays a Supporter card from their hand, prevent all effects of that card done to your Benched Pokémon V.

name: Magnezone
description: Some say that Magnezone receives signals from space via the antenna on its head and that it's being controlled by some mysterious being.

abilities.name: Giga Magnet
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may look at the top 6 cards of your deck and attach any number of Metal Energy cards you find there to your Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

name: Altaria
description: On sunny days, it flies freely through the sky and blends into the clouds. It sings in a beautiful soprano.

abilities.name: Tempting Tune
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, shuffle your deck, then put that card on top of it.

name: Latias
description: It can telepathically communicate with people. It changes its appearance using its down that refracts light.

abilities.name: Red Assist
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a Psychic Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Latios.

attacks.name: Dyna Barrier

name: Hisuian Goodra
description: Able to freely control the hardness of its metallic shell. It loathes solitude and is extremely clingy— it will fume and run riot if those dearest to it ever leave its side.

abilities.name: Metal Lodging
abilities.effect: Prevent all damage done to each of your Basic Pokémon that has any Metal Energy attached by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon V.

name: Ditto
description: It can reconstitute its entire cellular structure to change into what it sees, but it returns to normal when it relaxes.

abilities.name: Sudden Transformation
abilities.effect: This Pokémon can use the attacks of any Basic Pokémon in your discard pile, except for Pokémon with a Rule Box (Pokémon V, Pokémon-GX, etc. have Rule Boxes). (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

name: Dunsparce
description: When it sees a person, it digs a hole with its tail to make its escape. If you happen to find one, consider yourself lucky.

abilities.name: Mysterious Nest
abilities.effect: Colorless Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Weakness.

name: Miltank
description: Miltank produces highly nutritious milk, so it's been supporting the lives of people and other Pokémon since ancient times.

abilities.effect: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon V.

attacks.name: Rout
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Bibarel
description: It makes its nest by damming streams with bark and mud. It is known as an industrious worker.

attacks.name: Tail Smash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Riolu
description: It's exceedingly energetic, with enough stamina to keep running all through the night. Taking it for walks can be a challenging experience.

name: Swablu

attacks.name: Surprise Attack

name: Duskull
description: If it finds bad children who won't listen to their parents, it will spirit them away—or so it's said.

name: Bidoof
description: It constantly gnaws on logs and rocks to whittle down its front teeth. It nests alongside water.

name: Pikachu
description: Pikachu that can generate powerful electricity have cheek sacs that are extra soft and super stretchy.

name: Poochyena

You can use this card only if you discard 2 Metal Energy cards from your hand.

name: Grant
effect:
During this turn, your Fighting Pokémon's attacks do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
During your turn, if this Grant is in your discard pile, you may discard 2 cards, except any Grant, from your hand. If you do, put this Grant into your hand. (This effect doesn't use up your Supporter card for the turn.)

effect:
You can use this card only if your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining.
